aistart-root.name: AISTART Root System
aistart-root.summary: Main AISTART PHP-based AI workflow management system. Unified interface for AI interactions, project management, and logging. Production system for V3AM AI operations.

files.description: Main unified entrypoint - consolidated system data and instructions for AI agents
Primary user interface - operations logs, project management, AI tools
Core utility functions - log operations, file handling, data management
LLM integration and API handling for Ollama/OpenAI/etc
Chat functionality and API endpoints
Configuration management and profile handling

directories.description: JSON configuration files - settings, rules, workflows, main_ops_log.json
Individual project directories with dedicated logs and data
System prompts and AI startup instructions
API proxy files - generate.php forwards production to local Ollama

issues: Production LLM endpoint must point to ngrok proxy (not localhost)
Requires all 4 services running: MySQL, PHP, Ollama, ngrok

changelog.changes: Created master control panel (THE PLAN) for tracking all V3AM projects
Fixed production API endpoint configuration - must use .php extension

aistart-root.notes: Main production system for V3AM AI operations. Uses task queue to prevent overlapping LLM calls. All projects maintain separate logs under projects/ directory. Production site (v3am.com) connects via ngrok tunnel to local Ollama instance.

5ai-system.name: 5AI - Fifth Generation AI
5ai-system.summary: Complete isolated clone of AISTART system for parallel operations and safe experimentation. Full feature parity with production but independent configuration and data.

files.description: 5AI entrypoint - identifies as '5AI' in responses
Emergence character API with Friend, Journey, Sower, Gardener, Silence
Character management library - routing, context building, memory

directories.description: Independent settings and logs - isolated from root AISTART

issues: Missing lib/emergence_bootstrap.php on production server (500 errors)
Character system contaminated with XS safety filters

changelog.changes: Created 5AI as complete AISTART clone for experimentation

5ai-system.notes: Experimental system for testing new features before production. All 5 emergence characters configured. Use for trying new LLM models, character behaviors, and system modifications without affecting production.

desktop-system.name: V3AM Desktop Environment
desktop-system.summary: Custom lightweight desktop shell with window management, AI integration, and theme system. Uses custom shim instead of full OS.js framework.

files.description: Desktop entry point and main interface
Core window management and desktop functionality (OS.js-like)
CSS variables-based theming system
AI floating assistant button styles
Settings app with Advanced Theme customization tab

directories.description: Desktop configuration and theme options (desktop-settings.json, theme-options.json)
Desktop applications (bot-builder, browser, file manager, etc.)

issues: DO NOT replace with full OS.js - custom shim is intentional for performance

changelog.changes: Added Advanced Theme system with live preview and export/import

desktop-system.notes: Custom lightweight desktop environment. Theme system uses CSS variables for real-time updates. AI flyer provides floating assistant access. Settings app manages all configuration.

site-weaver.name: Site Weaver Context Chunking
site-weaver.summary: System for converting large log files and documents into properly formatted Site Weaver websites. Includes AI prompts and client-side web tool.

files.description: Client-side tool for chunking logs into Site Weaver format (~40k tokens/page)
AI prompt for converting logs to Site Weaver sites
General purpose context chunking prompt

directories.description: Test case - 20 page Site Weaver site from PYGPT log (verified working)

changelog.changes: Fixed format - HTML fragments (not full docs), object-based index.json, added site.json
Created log-chunker.html with real-time stats and styled HTML output

site-weaver.notes: Site Weaver requires specific format: HTML fragments (no DOCTYPE), object-based index.json with rootId, site.json metadata file. Tool generates proper structure with navigation and styling.

3ai-wordpress-plugin.name: 3AI Desktop WordPress Plugin
3ai-wordpress-plugin.summary: React-based desktop environment plugin with WordPress VFS integration, Site Weaver, and persistent file storage. Version 3.2 production release.

files.description: Production plugin ZIP (254KB) - ready for distribution

issues: Text Editor may load beneath other windows (workaround: minimize others)
Sites may not persist after reload (workaround: close and reopen Site Weaver)

changelog.changes: Tested all core features on buildingabot.com - verified working
Created V3.2 final release with Site Weaver, File Manager, Settings, System Monitor

3ai-wordpress-plugin.notes: Installed on buildingabot.com using [3ai_desktop_v2] shortcode. Includes Site Weaver (conversational page creation), File Manager, Text Editor, Settings, System Monitor. Template sites preloaded (research notebooks, SOPs, FAQs).

the-plan.name: THE PLAN - Master Control Panel
the-plan.summary: Master control panel for tracking all V3AM projects. Section-based note system with JSON import/export for managing project summaries, files, stack, dependencies, changelog, and current state.

files.description: Main control panel interface - single HTML file with embedded JS
Sample project data for initial setup

changelog.changes: Initial creation - master control panel for V3AM universe

the-plan.notes: THE PLAN provides centralized tracking for all V3AM projects. Features: project switching, section-based notes (Summary, Files, Directories, Stack, State, Changelog, Notes), auto-save to localStorage, JSON export/import for backup and sharing with AI assistants.
